use_cases: Displaying live current time on dashboards or landing pages
Creating countdown or elapsed time visualizations
Adding time-sensitive visual elements to media applications
Enhancing dev-tools interfaces with live clock functionality
ai_summary: A minimalist flip clock component that displays hours, minutes, and seconds with smooth animated digit transitions using Framer Motion. The component features a dark theme with monospace typography, updating in real-time every second. Each digit animates with a slide transition effect, creating a subtle flip-like visual when values change.
